requirement_topic.en: CE Marking — RED 2014/53/EU + SPRK Market Surveillance
requirement_topic.zh: CE标志 — RED 2014/53/EU + SPRK市场监督
requirement_topic.zht: CE標誌 — RED 2014/53/EU + SPRK市場監督

summary.en: Latvia is an EU member state; the Radio Equipment Directive (RED) 2014/53/EU applies directly and in full. All wireless and radio equipment placed on the Latvian market must bear the CE marking, backed by a signed EU Declaration of Conformity (DoC). The DoC must reference all applicable directives and harmonised standards (RED Art. 3.1(a) safety, Art. 3.1(b) EMC, Art. 3.2 radio performance, and Art. 3.3(d)-(f) cybersecurity where in scope). SPRK (Public Utilities Commission — Sabiedrisko pakalpojumu regulēšanas komisija) is Latvia's national market surveillance authority for RED; it conducts market checks, can issue withdrawal orders, and reports non-compliant products to the EU RAPEX/Safety Gate system. The Consumer Rights Protection Centre (PTAC — Patērētāju tiesību aizsardzības centrs) oversees general product safety market surveillance. CE marking must be affixed to the product or its packaging before placement; minimum marking height is 5 mm. Latvian-language labelling is required as Latvia's official language under EU labelling law.
summary.zh: 拉脱维亚是欧盟成员国，无线设备指令（RED）2014/53/EU直接且完整适用。投放拉脱维亚市场的所有无线和无线电设备须加贴CE标志，并辅以签署的欧盟合格声明（DoC）。DoC须引用所有适用指令和协调标准（RED第3.1(a)条安全、第3.1(b)条电磁兼容、第3.2条无线电性能，以及适用范围内的第3.3(d)-(f)条网络安全）。SPRK（公共事业委员会——Sabiedrisko pakalpojumu regulēšanas komisija）是拉脱维亚针对RED的国家市场监管机构，负责市场检查、可发出下架令，并向欧盟RAPEX/安全门系统报告不合规产品。消费者权益保护中心（PTAC——Patērētāju tiesību aizsardzības centrs）负责一般产品安全市场监管。CE标志须在放置前贴附于产品或包装，标志最低高度为5 mm。依据欧盟标签法，须提供拉脱维亚语标签。
summary.zht: 拉脫維亞是歐盟成員國，無線設備指令（RED）2014/53/EU直接且完整適用。投放拉脫維亞市場的所有無線和無線電設備須加貼CE標誌，並輔以簽署的歐盟合格聲明（DoC）。DoC須引用所有適用指令和協調標準（RED第3.1(a)條安全、第3.1(b)條電磁相容、第3.2條無線電性能，以及適用範圍內的第3.3(d)-(f)條網路安全）。SPRK（公共事業委員會——Sabiedrisko pakalpojumu regulēšanas komisija）是拉脫維亞針對RED的國家市場監管機構，負責市場檢查、可發出下架令，並向歐盟RAPEX/安全門系統報告不合規產品。消費者權益保護中心（PTAC——Patērētāju tiesību aizsardzības centrs）負責一般產品安全市場監管。CE標誌須在放置前貼附於產品或包裝，標誌最低高度為5 mm。依據歐盟標籤法，須提供拉脫維亞語標籤。

standards_or_laws: Directive 2014/53/EU (RED) — transposed into Latvian law via the Radio Equipment Law (Radioiekārtu likums) and related SPRK implementing regulations
Regulation (EU) 2019/1020 — market surveillance and conformity of products (SPRK as national authority for RED; PTAC for general product safety)
Decision 768/2008/EC — CE marking conformity assessment modules
Latvian Radio Equipment Law (Radioiekārtu likums) — national transposition of RED 2014/53/EU

summary.en: In China, market access for wireless devices requires SRRC Type Approval (NRA/MIIT) for the radio transmitter module and, for IT equipment such as Wi-Fi routers and IoT gateways, CCC (China Compulsory Certification) under CNCA-C17-01. A separate MIIT Network Access Licence (NAL) is required for certain telecom terminal equipment. The SAMR supervises market surveillance through its provincial bureaus. Neither SRRC nor CCC confers CE marking or satisfies RED conformity assessment obligations in Latvia or any EU country.
summary.zh: 在中国，无线设备进入市场须取得无线发射模块的SRRC型号核准（国家无线电管理局/工业和信息化部），以及IT设备（如Wi-Fi路由器和物联网网关）在CNCA-C17-01下的CCC（中国强制认证）。特定电信终端设备还须取得工业和信息化部网络进网许可证（NAL）。市场监管总局通过其省级分局负责市场监管。SRRC和CCC均不授予CE标志，也不满足拉脱维亚或任何欧盟国家的RED合格评定义务。
summary.zht: 在中國，無線設備進入市場須取得無線發射模組的SRRC型號核准（國家無線電管理局/工業和信息化部），以及IT設備（如Wi-Fi路由器和物聯網閘道器）在CNCA-C17-01下的CCC（中國強制認證）。特定電信終端設備還須取得工業和信息化部網路進網許可證（NAL）。市場監管總局通過其省級分局負責市場監管。SRRC和CCC均不授予CE標誌，也不滿足拉脫維亞或任何歐盟國家的RED合格評定義務。

standards_or_laws: SRRC Type Approval — NRA/MIIT mandatory radio licence for wireless transmitters
CCC — China Compulsory Certification (CNCA-C17-01 for IT equipment)
MIIT Network Access Licence (NAL) — for telecom terminal equipment

gap.en: CE marking under RED is a hard legal prerequisite for placing wireless devices on the Latvian market. SRRC and CCC are not recognised and cannot substitute. Key Latvia-specific points beyond the standard EU RED gap: (1) SPRK actively enforces RED through market surveillance and product withdrawals; PTAC supports general product safety enforcement; (2) Latvian-language labelling is mandatory — product name, manufacturer/EU AR name and address, model identifier, and intended use where not self-evident must appear in Latvian (Latin script); (3) Plug type C/F (Schuko) and 230 V/50 Hz must be confirmed for mains-powered devices; (4) WEEE registration with a Latvian producer compliance scheme (ZAAO or RecycleLV) is required before market placement of EEE; (5) Latvia's Riga Port is a growing Baltic Sea electronics distribution hub — products entering the Baltic corridor through Latvia are subject to Latvian CE compliance obligations at point of Latvian placement, even if onward shipment is intended. Chinese manufacturers must complete the full EU RED conformity assessment (testing, DoC, CE mark, EU AR appointment) before any shipment to Latvia.
gap.zh: RED下的CE标志是在拉脱维亚市场放置无线设备的硬性法律前提。SRRC和CCC不被认可，不能替代。除标准欧盟RED差距外，拉脱维亚特定要点如下：（1）SPRK通过市场监督和产品下架积极执行RED；PTAC负责一般产品安全执法；（2）拉脱维亚语标签为强制要求——产品名称、制造商/欧盟授权代表名称和地址、型号标识及非不言而喻的预期用途须以拉脱维亚语（拉丁字母）标注；（3）市电设备须确认C/F型插头（Schuko）和230 V/50 Hz；（4）在向拉脱维亚市场放置EEE前，须向拉脱维亚生产者合规计划（ZAAO或RecycleLV）完成WEEE注册；（5）拉脱维亚里加港是波罗的海地区日益重要的电子产品分销枢纽——通过拉脱维亚进入波罗的海走廊的产品，在拉脱维亚放置环节须满足CE合规要求，即使意图向前转运亦然。中国制造商在向拉脱维亚发货前，须完成完整的欧盟RED合格评定（检测、合格声明、CE标志、欧盟授权代表委任）。
gap.zht: RED下的CE標誌是在拉脫維亞市場放置無線設備的硬性法律前提。SRRC和CCC不被認可，不能取代。除標準歐盟RED差距外，拉脫維亞特定要點如下：（1）SPRK通過市場監督和產品下架積極執行RED；PTAC負責一般產品安全執法；（2）拉脫維亞語標籤為強制要求——產品名稱、製造商/歐盟授權代表名稱和地址、型號標識及非不言而喻的預期用途須以拉脫維亞語（拉丁字母）標注；（3）市電設備須確認C/F型插頭（Schuko）和230 V/50 Hz；（4）在向拉脫維亞市場放置EEE前，須向拉脫維亞生產者合規計劃（ZAAO或RecycleLV）完成WEEE登記；（5）拉脫維亞里加港是波羅的海地區日益重要的電子產品分銷樞紐——通過拉脫維亞進入波羅的海走廊的產品，在拉脫維亞放置環節須滿足CE合規要求，即使意圖向前轉運亦然。中國製造商在向拉脫維亞發貨前，須完成完整的歐盟RED合格評定（檢測、合格聲明、CE標誌、歐盟授權代表委任）。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — RED 2014/53/EU as transposed into Latvian law (Radioiekārtu likums); CE marking required before placement on Latvian market; SPRK enforces
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — SRRC Type Approval + CCC (where applicable) for Chinese domestic market; not recognised in Latvia

source.publisher: SPRK (Public Utilities Commission — Sabiedrisko pakalpojumu regulēšanas komisija)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] CE marking under RED 2014/53/EU is the primary market-access gate for wireless devices entering Latvia. SPRK enforces RED nationally; PTAC supports general product safety surveillance; non-compliant products are subject to withdrawal and RAPEX notification. SRRC and CCC are not recognised. Latvian-language labelling and WEEE registration with ZAAO/RecycleLV are additional mandatory obligations beyond the EU-wide CE marking requirement.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] RED 2014/53/EU下的CE标志是无线设备进入拉脱维亚的主要市场准入门槛。SPRK在国内执行RED；PTAC负责一般产品安全监督；不合规产品面临下架和RAPEX通报。SRRC和CCC不被认可。拉脱维亚语标签和向ZAAO/RecycleLV完成WEEE注册，是欧盟范围CE标志要求之外的额外强制义务。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] RED 2014/53/EU下的CE標誌是無線設備進入拉脫維亞的主要市場准入門檻。SPRK在國內執行RED；PTAC負責一般產品安全監督；不合規產品面臨下架和RAPEX通報。SRRC和CCC不被認可。拉脫維亞語標籤和向ZAAO/RecycleLV完成WEEE登記，是歐盟範圍CE標誌要求之外的額外強制義務。
